channel.title: Banking and Financial Institutions - Tag - bounds.dev
channel.description: Banking and Financial Institutions - Tag - bounds.dev

item.title: Tariffs, Trade, and Tech
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Tariffs, Trade, and Tech

In tariffs, Trump’s tactics were bold,
But inflation made wallets unfold.
While China kept pace,
Banks joined the race,
And chip sales to China were sold.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • U.S. Inflation Accelerated in June as Trump’s Tariffs Pushed Up Prices
  • China’s Economy Grows Steadily Despite Trump’s Tariffs
  • For Big Banks, the Trump Era Is Proving Profitable Thus Far
  • Nvidia and AMD Stocks Soar as Trump Administration Lifts A.I. Chip Sale Restrictions

item.title: Tariff Terrors and Economic Woes
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Tariff Terrors and Economic Woes

Trump’s tariffs leave markets in dread,
With factories scratching their head.
The Fed’s in a stew,
Debating what’s true,
As recession fears wildly spread.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • As Trump’s Tariffs Stoke Economic Uncertainty, the Fed Debates Its Next Steps
  • Trump Loves Tariffs. Do Americans?
  • How Trump’s Tariffs Are Hitting One Chinese Factory Owner: ‘We Are Helpless’

item.title: The Rate Debate
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

The Rate Debate

In Washington, bonds start to climb,
Though the Fed cuts rates all the time.
Trump’s plans make them wary,
As Powell’s stance stays contrary,
Mortgage rates hit a new paradigm.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Why Bond Yields Are Rising After Trump’s Victory
  • If the Fed Is Cutting Rates, Why Are Mortgage Rates Rising?
  • What Trump’s Win Means for the Federal Reserve and Jerome Powell
